overall_justification: While the newspaper edition includes a variety of content, the most prominent article related to the "Caixa de Conversão" debate clearly leans towards an Expansionist perspective.  The article, titled "'Quebra e não quebra'", focuses on the discussion of a project related to the Caixa and explicitly mentions the proposed exchange rate of 12d. This focus on a specific rate, lower than the orthodox preference, suggests an Expansionist leaning.  While other articles mention government activities and financial matters, none directly address the Caixa debate with comparable prominence or clarity of position.

supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote directly references the Caixa de Conversão and the proposed 12d exchange rate, which is a key tenet of the Expansionist position.  Its inclusion in the article titled "'Quebra e não quebra'" highlights the newspaper's focus on this aspect of the debate.
